metadata.homeTitle: Jungle Wildlife Tours · Manuel Antonio, Costa Rica
metadata.homeDescription: Nature and wildlife tours in Manuel Antonio and Quepos. Ground safari, mangrove walk on Damas Island, and night walk with an ICT-certified guide.

hero.title: Manuel Antonio
hero.subtitle: awaits you
hero.description: Guided nature tours in Manuel Antonio National Park and surrounding areas. Real wildlife, certified guides.
hero.heroImageAlt: Tropical rainforest canopy in Manuel Antonio at dawn

about.title: About us
about.intro: We are a local nature tour company in Manuel Antonio and Quepos, focused on real wildlife experiences in Costa Rica's central Pacific region.
about.story: We were born here and operate here. We are not a travel agency or an intermediary: the guide who meets you is the same person who knows the trails, channels, and local wildlife habits.

certifications.ict: Guide certification issued by the ICT

whyUsCards.localBody: Born and raised in Manuel Antonio. We know every trail, every hiding spot, every season rhythm.
whyUsCards.certifiedBody: ICT-certified professionals with deep knowledge of Costa Rica's biodiversity and conservation.
whyUsCards.smallBody: Intimate experiences, never crowded. Your pace, your interests, our full attention.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Real photos from the Manuel Antonio and Quepos area.
gallery.mangroveNote: There are no real photos of the mangrove walk yet.

night.heading: The jungle comes alive at night
night.description: The night walk reveals a side of Manuel Antonio few see: amphibians, insects, mammals, and the activity that only happens under the canopy of darkness.
night.imageAlt: Nocturnal wildlife in Manuel Antonio jungle

parallax.heading: Where nature sets the pace
parallax.description: Each tour is an immersion into a living ecosystem.
